one_sentence_fix: Add genuine texture and rim-light to the large flat strata bands and plain reservoir lenses, and fill the quiet lower-half dead zones on cover (S1) and close (S9) so every region survives the zoom test.
editor_notes: No hard fails; ships 8.90 vs 8.3. STAK c15/Northern Journal reused as legitimate context (new topic, the Jul 10 RCA gas-storage denial). Merge to main before Gmail (URLs point at main). On-slide apostrophes render with a slight serif curl but are straight U+0027 at source (documented run-1 false positive).
